title: Clippy Cursor Analysis Data
description: Data schema for the Clippy AI cursor analysis adaptive card.

icon.description: URL or base64 data URI for the Clippy icon.

action.description: The action type that was performed.

cursorX.description: Screen X coordinate where the action was triggered.

cursorY.description: Screen Y coordinate where the action was triggered.

imagePath.description: Local file path to the captured screenshot.

contextJsonPath.description: Local file path to the generated semantic screen-context JSON.

contextMarkdownPath.description: Local file path to the generated semantic screen-context Markdown report.

windowCount.description: Number of visible top-level windows discovered by Win32 scanning.

interactableCount.description: Number of interactable UI Automation elements discovered.
